Note: Participant says they are normally not susceptible to car or motion sickness
Participant was struggling to see screen while sunlight was hitting passenger seat
Participant was attempting to turn volume up in instagram reels but was having problems conducting pinching gesture. Took a couple of attempts
Participant says that scrolling hand gesture is more responsive than volume control
Participant using sun visor as screen backdrop which is a light grey color
Participant describes their experience viewing content as less clear when car is in motion since the screen seems to bobble around, making it difficult to focus on details like text
Participant having to adjust neural band since hand gestures are less responsive than in previous sessions
Participant finds that keeping hand on lap while performing hand gestures responds more accurately than elevating hand
